title: FastXP+
description: A simple client-side optimization mod that allows you to throw XP bottles instantly and fast by just holding down the right-click.
body:
## FastXP

FastXP is a lightweight, client-side optimization mod designed to improve your experience when handling Experience Bottles (Potions of Enchanting) in Minecraft.

### Features
* **No Throw Delay:** Completely removes the vanilla 4-tick internal cooldown when holding down your right-click button to throw XP bottles.
* **Rapid Throwing:** Allows you to empty entire stacks of experience bottles almost instantly, saving you time at XP farms or during repairs.
* **100% Client-Side:** Works perfectly on any vanilla, Paper, Purpur, or Spigot server without needing the mod installed on the server side.

### Requirements
* Minecraft 1.21.4
* Fabric Loader![İcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1766ad62cf6c54f3ae14e6ea38e149b6b1c06462.png)
